item.title: Il Dilemma dell'Algoritmo - PMI Northern Italy Chapter
item.description: Me and Paolo Santinello, from KlinK, presented a talk at the annual meeting of the Project Management Institute - Northern Italy Chapter. Our talk Il Dilemma dell’Algoritmo - questioni etiche e strumenti di IA nei processi decisionali di Project Management was given in front of more than 300 PMI Project Managers and partners. We talked about how Agent Based Modeling can deal with uncertainty and ethics in the context of a specific project, raising the question of accountability of a decision in the presence of multiple options.

item.title: Smart Applications Teaching Assistant
item.description:
The Smart Applications course, taught by Prof. Vincenzo Gervasi, is approaching the end. I had a lot of fun assisting both projects and really hope to see them in action soon 😄

Congrats to all students of Art and Sport projects!

item.title: Intel Student Ambassador for AI
item.description: I have been chosen to represent University of Pisa in Intel® Student Ambassador for AI program.
